# Implement Students CRUD & Profiles

Create student records with contact details, enrollment status, permissions, and activity history.

## Tasks

- Define `Student` model (name, email, contacts, allergies, permissions, enrolled flag).
- Add CRUD API/GraphQL resolvers and list/detail UI pages.
- Connect signups/unregisters to student profiles rather than free-form emails.
- Add basic tests and migration for existing sample participants.

## Rationale

Student profiles enable proper authorization, auditing, and richer UX (history, contact management).

Suggested labels: backend, frontend
